SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-14-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO ASSIGN TO A REGULAR JUDGE. DEFT. SPENCER THOMAS WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A PRO TEM COMMISSIONER.
SPENCER THOAMS, PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF SPENCER THOAMS AND OBJECTION TO HEARING/TRIAL.
